lessons.control: Exact expected/applied target-set equality blocks partial propagation
Publication and effectiveness are independent closure gates
Synthetic predecessor fixtures must reproduce canonical Master Asset Register registration topology and must not invent formal-asset rows.
lessons.regression: governance predecessor files exist in Git but are absent from the synthetic Master Asset Register; forced rollback and clean reapply must pass.

lessons.control: All production Python text writers must declare newline="\n" so runtime-generated working-tree bytes remain identical to staged Git bytes on Windows.
lessons.regression: AST audit of production write_text calls plus Windows PowerShell 5.1 staged-byte equality gate.

lessons.control: All Build 0053 tests are restricted to exact manifest ownership, run in the temporary clone before canonical apply, and any later canonical gate failure triggers automatic transaction rollback.
lessons.regression: BUILD_0053_PRE_CANONICAL_FULL_SUITE_VALIDATED plus staged post-import rollback to ROLLBACK_STATE_EXACT.
